bio: He is a black wolf with some extra fluff that looks spiky despite it being very soft.  As the youngest member of the team, he usually carries most of the team's stuffs using straps and bags on his body and it actually hindered his usually nimble movements. He will listen to Tharos most of the times, unless he noticed something he is interested in as he will go and figure things out by himself in excitement. But despite this, the team will be deeply saddened if he is missing.
nameMeaning: Tharros means courage in Greek. Thanatos means death and was the personification of death (Greek mythology). -ρός (-rós) from Ancient Greek means -able, tending to X'ed (for the verb X).
personalityValues: fits in the team and everyone accepts him
personalityQuirks: believes that if everyone told him he could do it, he could do it
bodyShapeDescription:
a black wolf with extra fluff that looks spiky despite it being very soft on his head, face, neck, back, and legs. He has silver eyes that brimmed with joy and excitement, but it will glow yellow whenever he uses electric-based moves.

When he is agitated, he seems to have a yellowish aura around his whole body, which looks like a thunderstorm cloud. As the youngest member of the team, he usually carries most of the team's stuffs using straps and bags on his body. This actually hindered his usually nimble movements.
